text:
You are a senior full-stack engineer.

Your job is to FULLY DEBUG, FIX, and STABILIZE this roommate matching app (React + Node.js + MySQL) so it works perfectly both locally and when deployed.

DO NOT rewrite the project.
DO NOT change UI design or color palette.
ONLY fix and stabilize.

--------------------------------------------------
PHASE 1: PROJECT AUDIT
--------------------------------------------------
- Analyze entire codebase (frontend + backend)
- Understand:
  - API structure
  - database schema
  - routing
  - state management

Identify:
- broken flows
- missing connections
- inconsistent logic

--------------------------------------------------
PHASE 2: LOCAL ENVIRONMENT FIX
--------------------------------------------------

Ensure BOTH servers run:

Backend:
- cd backend
- npm install
- npm run dev
- must run on http://localhost:3000

Frontend:
- cd frontend-react
- npm install
- npm run dev
- must run on http://localhost:5173

Fix:
- crashes
- missing dependencies
- wrong ports
- blank pages

--------------------------------------------------
PHASE 3: FRONTEND ↔ BACKEND CONNECTION
--------------------------------------------------

Fix ALL API calls:

- Replace relative paths (/api/...) with:
  http://localhost:3000/api/...

- Ensure headers:
  "Content-Type": "application/json"

- Fix backend CORS:
  app.use(cors({
    origin: "http://localhost:5173",
    credentials: true
  }))

--------------------------------------------------
PHASE 4: AUTH SYSTEM
--------------------------------------------------

Fix login flow:

- /api/login must return userId
- Store userId in frontend:
  localStorage.setItem("userId", user.id)

- Ensure all features use this userId:
  - shortlist
  - matches
  - compare

Fix issue where login says "email and password required"

--------------------------------------------------
PHASE 5: SHORTLIST SYSTEM
--------------------------------------------------

Fix complete shortlist flow:

- Ensure DB table exists
- POST /api/shortlist → inserts correctly
- GET /api/shortlist/:userId → returns saved users

Frontend:
- ensure correct userId is sent
- ensure shortlist renders data

--------------------------------------------------
PHASE 6: COMPARE PAGE FIX
--------------------------------------------------

Fix blank screen:

- correctly read URL params (u1, u2)
- fetch both users
- add loading state
- add error fallback

Prevent crashes:
- use optional chaining everywhere

Replace:
- "User 1 / User 2"
With:
- actual user names

Fix move-in timeline logic:
- calculate date difference
- show:
  - Excellent match
  - Moderate overlap
  - Poor alignment

--------------------------------------------------
PHASE 7: GLOBAL STABILITY
--------------------------------------------------

Fix everywhere:

- undefined/null crashes
- missing data handling
- no blank pages allowed
- add loading states

--------------------------------------------------
PHASE 8: DEPLOYMENT (NETLIFY FIX)
--------------------------------------------------

Fix 404 errors on refresh:

Add ONE of:

Option A:
Create public/_redirects:
  /* /index.html 200

Option B:
Create netlify.toml:
[[redirects]]
  from = "/*"
  to = "/index.html"
  status = 200

Ensure correct build folder (dist for Vite)

--------------------------------------------------
PHASE 9: PRODUCTION API HANDLING
--------------------------------------------------

Replace hardcoded API URLs with:

const API_URL =
  process.env.NODE_ENV === "production"
    ? "https://your-backend-url.com"
    : "http://localhost:3000";

Use this in ALL API calls

--------------------------------------------------
FINAL GOAL
--------------------------------------------------

The app MUST:

- Run locally without errors
- Frontend and backend must communicate correctly
- Login must work
- Matches must load
- Shortlist must save and display
- Compare page must work without blank screen
- Deployment must work without 404 errors

No crashes.
No blank pages.
No broken flows.

Think like a production engineer.
Fix everything properly.
